meta.name: India
meta.title: India Tour Package from Malaysia | Dhesu Travel & Tours
meta.description: From the Himalayas to Kerala backwaters, explore India with Dhesu. Trusted Malaysian travel agency since 1988. Group, custom and honeymoon packages available.

hero.badge: A Continent Pretending to Be a Country
hero.headline: India Is Not
hero.body: The India at the foot of the Taj Mahal at dawn is a different India from the Kerala backwaters, which is different again from the ancient ghats of Varanasi. It asks a lot of you, and gives back far more.

why.heading: No Two Trips to India Are Ever the Same
why.subheading: It is loud, dense and full of surprises. But travellers who go once almost always go again, and they almost always go somewhere different.

highlights.title: The Golden Triangle
highlights.body: Where most first-timers start. Delhi's old-city lanes and spice markets, the Taj Mahal in Agra at sunrise turning gold, and Jaipur's Pink City forts and bazaars. More beautiful in person than any photograph.

highlights.title: Kashmir Stops People Mid-Sentence
highlights.body: Wooden houseboats and shikaras gliding across Dal Lake at dawn. The impossibly green meadows of Gulmarg in summer, deep snow in winter, and the pine valleys of Pahalgam. It should be on every India itinerary.

highlights.title: Kerala Slows Time Right Down
highlights.body: Drift through hundreds of kilometres of backwater channels on a converted rice barge, palm trees leaning over the water and kingfishers on the banks. Up in the hills, Munnar's tea plantations roll on as far as you can see.

highlights.title: Varanasi Will Change You
highlights.body: One of the oldest living cities on earth. The Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat, with fire, flowers and bells at sunset, has been performed every day for centuries. Confronting, deeply real, and impossible to forget.

zones.heading: Where to Go and Why
zones.subheading: India is a continent disguised as a country. Each region feels like an entirely different holiday.

areas.name: Golden Triangle
areas.description: Delhi, Agra and Jaipur. Mughal monuments, royal palaces and the Taj Mahal. The classic first-timer route through the north.

areas.name: Kashmir
areas.description: Dal Lake houseboats, alpine meadows and snow in winter. The Himalayan north at its most beautiful, cool even in summer.

areas.name: Kerala
areas.description: Houseboats, tea plantations and the slow green south between the Western Ghats and the Arabian Sea. Where the pace finally drops.

areas.name: Shimla & Manali
areas.description: Colonial hill towns, the Shimla toy train and the high snow fields of the Rohtang Pass beyond Manali. Lower-Himalayan air and silence.

bestTime.heading: Best Time to Visit India from Malaysia
bestTime.body: India is large enough that the best time depends on where you are going.

seasons.name: Cool Season
seasons.description: The most comfortable window for most destinations, especially the north and centre. Prime time for the Golden Triangle and Rajasthan.

seasons.name: Summer & Monsoon
seasons.description: Hot on the northern plains, but this is when the hill stations and the Himalayas (May to October) come into their own. Kerala stays fine year-round.

tripLength.heading: How Many Days Do You Actually Need?

options.label: One Region
options.description: Enough to do a single region properly, like the Golden Triangle or a focused Kashmir or Kerala escape.

options.label: Sweet Spot
options.description: If it is your first time and you want a real sense of the country, plan for at least 10 days.

options.label: North & South
options.description: Two weeks lets you combine north and south meaningfully, adding Varanasi or the Himalayas along the way.

whyBook.heading: Why Book Your India Trip Through Dhesu
whyBook.body: India is one of those destinations that benefits enormously from having the right people in your corner. We have been sending Malaysians to India since 1988, and we know the guides who know their history, the hotels with rooms that actually face the river, and the routes that avoid the traffic.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.description: Fully licensed and registered. We handle e-Visa documentation guidance for all India packages.

points.title: Trusted Since 1988
points.description: 35+ years arranging India journeys, from the Taj Mahal to the Himalayas to Kerala.

points.title: The Right People on the Ground
points.description: Guides who know their history, vetted hotels, and a team you can call if something goes sideways.

points.title: Group, Custom & Honeymoon
points.description: English-speaking guides and airport transfers included. Packages built to your requirements.

cta.heading: Plan Your India Trip
cta.subheading: Tell us which part of India calls to you. We will plan the rest.
cta.address: Level 2 and 3, Wisma Dhesu, No. 5 Jalan Bangsar Utama 3, 59000 Kuala Lumpur.

packages.heading: India Packages for Every Traveller
packages.subheading: Every Dhesu India package comes with English-speaking guides, airport transfers and a team you can call if something goes sideways. International flights can be added on request.
packages.ctaNote: Custom and group packages built to your requirements.
